attribution_window_note: TikTok Business API report/integrated/get. Attribution window assumed TikTok default click 7d / view 1d unless Ads Manager says otherwise. API does not expose website CTA/VTA purchase value here; CTA/VTA counts use cta_conversion/vta_conversion fallback when purchase split metrics are empty.
